hooks.prompt:
The user is about to run a git commit. Your job is to update CHANGELOG.md before the commit runs.

Steps:
1. Run `git diff --cached --name-only` to see what files are staged
2. Run `git diff --cached` to read the actual changes
3. Read CHANGELOG.md
4. Update the [Unreleased] section with a concise bullet summary of the staged changes. Use Added / Changed / Fixed / Removed subsections as appropriate. One bullet per logical change — be specific but brief.
5. Run `git add CHANGELOG.md` so the updated changelog is included in the commit

Do not block the commit. Do not commit yourself. Just update and stage CHANGELOG.md.
